tickets.subject: Unable to login to account
tickets.description: User unable to log in despite using correct credentials. Password reset also failed.

tickets.subject: Website not loading
tickets.description: Website is not loading on multiple browsers. Cleared cache, still no success.

tickets.subject: Payment failure during checkout
tickets.description: Payment gateway error while trying to pay using a credit card.
tickets.resolution: Payment gateway fixed, and customer successfully completed the purchase.

tickets.subject: Request for password reset
tickets.description: Customer has not received a password reset email despite multiple attempts.

tickets.subject: Feature not working in the mobile app
tickets.description: Push notifications are not working in the Android app.

tickets.subject: Unable to access admin panel
tickets.description: Admin panel returns a 403 Forbidden error for authorized users.

tickets.subject: Bug in reporting dashboard
tickets.description: Generated reports show incorrect data for the last quarter.

tickets.subject: Integration issue with third-party API
tickets.description: API response is returning a 500 error for all requests.
tickets.resolution: Issue fixed on the third-party API server.

tickets.subject: Request for data migration
tickets.description: Customer wants to migrate their data from the old system to the new platform.

tickets.subject: Account suspended without reason
tickets.description: User's account was suspended without prior notice or explanation.
